prompt: Generate a world map showing the source regions of each food. Place the images near their production zones with markers.
prompt_refined: Generate an informative world map illustrating food source regions. Clearly place image 1 (cheese wedges) with a marker over Europe. Position image 2 (chocolate bar and pieces) with a marker over a major cacao-producing region like West Africa or South America. Place image 3 (olive oil bottle) with a marker over Spain, directly reflecting its origin. Each food image should be visually linked to its geographical production zone on the map, presented in a clean information graphic style.
objects: Marker for cheese wedges over Europe
Marker for chocolate over a major cacao-producing region (e.g., West Africa or South America)
Marker for olive oil over Spain
Visual links connecting each food image/marker to its respective geographical production zone
Labels for continents and specific regions (Europe, Spain, West Africa/South America)
Title for the information graphic (e.g., "Food Source Regions World Map")
